refined_fr.refined_fr: Derive, record, and manage performance requirements (e.g., cycle time, energy efficiency, availability) from worksite mission context to ensure traceability and history maintenance.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and combines multiple functions. Refining it into a single atomic FR clarifies the scope and enables focused design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baselines and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Manage performance requirement history including baselines and calibration updates

candidate_dps: Algorithmic model to extract performance metrics from mission data
Database schema and storage for performance requirements and history
User interface and API for managing and updating performance requirements
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining algorithmic derivation, database management, and user/API interface for performance requirements

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation algorithm and database schema
Interface dependencies between user/API and data storage
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions minimizing cross-module dependencies.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if synchronization between derivation and recording is not maintained
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing derivation and management functions if complexity or coupling increases in future iterations.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the overall NGHE system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives mission context and operational data for performance derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends derived performance targets and updates to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange for performance management across distributed modules

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the DP logically fits within this module; low diffusion risk.
Poor containment; performance management logic does not align with vehicle hardware control.
Low containment; teleoperation focuses on control, not performance requirement management.
Minimal containment; safety services unrelated to performance requirement derivation.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Performance requirement derivation and management is best contained within the NGHE Solution module to centralize logic and data management.
containment_risks: Potential overload of NGHE Solution module if other unrelated functions are also assigned here
Interface complexity with other modules if data exchange is not well defined
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module size and interface complexity; consider splitting if diffusion risk increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear traceability and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to strong containment within NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented performance targets and history audits within the NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functionality to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions as system integration progresses
Evaluate modularization if NGHE Solution module scope expands

decision.justification: The decomposition is sound but the FR is not yet atomic; further refinement into sub-FRs is needed to complete the level.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Manage performance requirement history including baselines and calibration updates

revise.why: To achieve atomicity and enable more precise DP and IM assignments at the next level.

assumptions: Mission context data is reliable and accessible
NGHE Solution module can support integrated software functions
open_risks: Data synchronization between derivation and recording functions
Potential module overload if scope expands
evidence_needed: Demonstration of data flow from Telemetry interface
Prototype of performance requirement management within NGHE Solution
